question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists three main sections of the thesis: 1) LVM analīze un pielietojums augstākajā matemātikā, 2) rīka izstrāde un integrāļu risināšanas funkcionalitāte, 3) praktiskais pielietojums. However, it would be beneficial to provide a more detailed overview of each section and their relationships.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides a brief description of the contents of each section, but it is quite general. It would be helpful to include more specific information about what can be expected from each chapter.

question: Structure
feedback: Yes, it is easy to understand the general structure of the thesis just from this text. The three main sections are clearly outlined, and the reader gets a sense of how they relate to each other.
